---
title: '2014/05/29 Journal'
date: '2014-05-29T11:33:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9006994235634722265'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/20140529-journal.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>New job is going well. I can see certain pain points that most of the crew suffer from, I could see those being areas of stress if I allowed them to enter in. I don't plan to!</p>
<p>Kids are doing a week of camp and wacky week in June. That's two weeks of fun for them.</p>
<p>I've come to a point I should have years ago. I can't be the provider for this house. I've got to figure out how to tap into His provision.</p>
<p>Seek FIRST His kingdom and righteousness then all these provisions will be added to you...</p>
<p>I'm going to use the blog as a means of trying to minister His kingdom, really treat it as a ministry, then roll the care of MY needs over on Him...</p>
